content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ties the course narrative into literary history.
✔ Shakes up faction dynamics—players must suddenly work together or turn on each other.
✔ Ensures unpredictability while still thematically relevant.

📜 2. The Weekly Heavenly Item – A One-Time-Only Divine Relic

📜 Each week, one ultra-rare, difficult-to-obtain artifact is available.

✔ Only one exists per week—once it’s claimed (or lost), it is gone forever.
✔ It is extremely difficult to acquire (high XP cost or skill check needed).
✔ If not claimed, it disappears forever.

📖 Examples of Weekly Heavenly Items
